 {"id":"bd-212m.2.7","title":"Glamour: fix blockquote multi-paragraph + nested","description":"Fix blockquote formatting for multi-paragraph and nested blockquotes to match Go.

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixtures: blockquote_multi_paragraph, blockquote_nested.
- Inspect blockquote rendering in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (Tag::BlockQuote handling) and how paragraph breaks are inserted.
- Ensure empty line between paragraphs and correct nesting markers per Go.
- Add unit tests for multi-paragraph and nested blockquotes.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- blockquote_multi_paragraph and blockquote_nested fixtures pass with no SKIP.
- Unit tests cover paragraph separation within blockquotes and nested depth prefixing.
- Conformance test_glamour passes for blockquote cases.","notes":"Files: crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (blockquote rendering), tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs fixtures for blockquote_*.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:44.230449417Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:25:19.629261457Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:44.230449417Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.2.8","title":"Glamour: align NoTTY/ASCII preset code formatting","description":"Align NoTTY and ASCII preset code formatting with Go.

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixtures: style_preset_notty, style_preset_ascii.
- Inspect preset definitions in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (StyleConfig presets) and code/inline code styling.
- Match Go output for code formatting in these presets (no backticks if Go omits them, spacing, etc.).
- Add unit tests to lock preset outputs.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- style_preset_notty and style_preset_ascii fixtures pass with no SKIP.
- Unit tests cover preset output for code blocks and inline code.
- Conformance test_glamour passes for preset cases.","notes":"Files: crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (preset builders + style_inline_code, StyleCodeBlock), tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs preset fixtures.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:51.348054745Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:25:27.291653816Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.8","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:51.348054745Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.2.9","title":"Glamour: fix Dracula preset heading prefix","description":"Fix Dracula preset heading prefix character to match Go output.

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixture: style_preset_dracula.
- Inspect Dracula preset in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs and heading rendering in style config.
- Align heading prefix glyph/spacing with Go.
- Add unit test asserting Dracula heading output for h1-h3.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- style_preset_dracula fixture passes with no SKIP.
- Unit tests cover Dracula heading prefix and spacing.

 {"id":"bd-212m.3.1","title":"Lipgloss: implement partial border edges","description":"Implement partial border edges in Lipgloss to match Go behavior.

Scope:
- Reproduce fixture: border_partial_top_bottom.
- Extend border definition and rendering pipeline to support per-edge presence and partial edges.
- Ensure width/height and padding calculations remain correct with missing edges.
- Add unit tests for partial edges and mixed edge visibility.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- border_partial_top_bottom fixture passes with no SKIP.
- Unit tests cover top-only, bottom-only, left-only, right-only, and mixed edges.
- cargo test -p charmed_conformance test_lipgloss passes for border fixtures.","notes":"Files: crates/lipgloss/src/border.rs (edge definition), style.rs (border config), renderer.rs (drawing).  {"id":"bd-212m.4","title":"Huh parity gaps","description":"Close Huh parity gaps: textarea field support, theme parity verification, and any compile blockers discovered in conformance runs.

Scope:
- Implement textarea (multiline text) field consistent with Go (model, view, keybindings, validation).
- Verify Catppuccin theme parity (colors + styles).
- Address KeyMap file_picker initializer compile error impacting benchmark tests.
- Add unit tests + conformance fixtures for all changes.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Huh conformance tests pass with 0 skips for text_* fixtures.
- Theme tests (including Catppuccin) pass and match Go outputs.
- Benchmark compile tests no longer fail due to Huh build errors.","notes":"Files: crates/huh/src/lib.rs, tests/conformance/crates/huh/mod.rs, tests/conformance/fixtures/go_outputs/huh.json.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:49:10.621584272Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:27:03.075052572Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.4","depends_on_id":"bd-212m","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:49:10.621584272Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.4.1","title":"Huh: implement textarea field","description":"Implement textarea (multiline text) field in Huh to match Go behavior.

Scope:
- Add Textarea field type to Huh form model, including state (value, cursor, scroll, width/height, char limit).
- Implement update() handling for multiline editing, navigation, and submit behavior in crates/huh/src/lib.rs.
- Implement view() rendering and styling to match Go (placeholder, line wrapping, cursor).
- Update conformance fixtures (text_basic, text_with_lines, text_placeholder, text_char_limit) and add unit tests.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- Conformance fixtures text_basic, text_with_lines, text_placeholder, text_char_limit pass with no SKIP.
- Unit tests cover multiline editing, cursor movement, line wrapping, and char limit enforcement.
- cargo test -p charmed_conformance test_huh passes for text fixtures.","notes":"Files: crates/huh/src/lib.rs (Field enum + textarea model/update/view), tests/conformance/crates/huh/mod.rs, tests/conformance/fixtures/go_outputs/huh.json. Keep behavior consistent with Go legacy_huh textarea implementation.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:49:18.386535304Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T01:27:11.140679775Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T01:20:01.055871584Z","close_reason":"Text field (textarea for forms) implemented as part of bd-1o6y. Includes multiline input, line navigation, character limit, and line numbers.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.4.1","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:49:18.386535304Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
